caption: A man with a shaved head and a dark beard is recording in a studio against a black, sound-absorbing foam wall. He wears black over-ear headphones and a white t-shirt featuring a small black logo that reads "The Thinker". A silver professional microphone, held by a black boom arm, is positioned directly in front of his mouth. As the sequence progresses, the man begins by looking slightly upward and to his left with his mouth open as if speaking. He then closes his eyes and tilts his head slightly downward, momentarily pausing. He continues with his eyes closed and mouth slightly open before finally opening his eyes and looking forward, continuing to speak into the microphone. The camera remains in a steady medium close-up shot throughout the clip.
